# 2026-04-01 07:40:11Z

<!-- cursoride Session 637c6301-0c01-489b-96c3-a5e4bebeda4f (2026-04-01 07:40:11Z) -->

_**User**_

Open the local app at http://127.0.0.1:4173/. If the page loads, click the sample data button if needed. Scroll to the transaction statement preview section and inspect the current '거래명세표 미리보기' layout carefully. Return a concise report with: (1) visible layout problems compared to a typical invoice template, (2) whether text/cells are overlapping, oversized, or misaligned, (3) any obvious print-preview issues you can infer from the on-screen structure. Do not modify anything.

---

_**Agent (claude-4.5-sonnet)**_

I'll open the local app and inspect the transaction statement preview section to provide you with a detailed report on any layout issues.

role: button\\n      name: 바로 인쇄\\n      ref: e82\\n      name: 로컬 시범 버전\\n      ref: e16\\n    - role: heading\\n      name: 거래명세서 입력 및 월별 납품현황 관리\\n      ref: e17\\n      level: 1\\n      name: 거래명세서를 먼저 입력하고, 같은 데이터를 기반으로 월별 납품현황을 자동 집계할 수 있게 만든 초안입니다. 저장 데이터는 현재 브라우저에만 보관됩니다.\\n      ref: e18\\n    - role: heading\\n      name: 거래명세서 입력\\n      ref: e19\\n      level: 2\\n      name: 입력하면 아래 목록과 월별 납품현황에 바로 반영됩니다.\\n      ref: e20\\n      name: 납품일\\n      ref: e21\\n      name: 횟수\\n      ref: e22\\n      name: 거래처명\\n      ref: e23\\n      name: \\\"납품 품목 품목을 선택하세요 에티오피아 코케허니 예가체프 G1 에티오피아 예가체프 G2 에티오피아 모모라 워시드 구지 G1 케냐 AA FAQ 인도네시아 아체가요 G1 인도네시아 만델링 G1 과테말라 안티구아 SHB 디카페인 (안티구아+세하도 50:50) 브라질 세하도 콜롬비아 다리오 수프리모 블렌딩 다크로스나 블렌딩 라이트 과테말라 안티구아 디카페인 브라질\\\"\\n      ref: e24\\n      name: 규격/단위 규격/단위를 선택하세요 1/KG 200/G 1/L 직접 입력\\n      ref: e25\\n      name: 수량\\n      ref: e26\\n      name: 단가\\n      ref: e27\\n      name: 발행일자\\n      ref: e28\\n      name: 입금일자\\n      ref: e29\\n    - role: heading\\n      name: 엑셀 미리보기\\n      ref: e30\\n      level: 2\\n      name: 저장 전에 실제 엑셀처럼 하단에서 바로 확인할 수 있습니다.\\n      ref: e31\\n    - role: heading\\n      name: 거래명세표\\n      ref: e83\\n      level: 3\\n    - role: heading\\n      name: 거래명세표\\n      ref: e84\\n      level: 3\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\"},{\"type\":\"image\",\"data\":\"\",\"mimeType\":\"image/png\"}]}"
```json
}
```
Status: **completed**


</details>
</tool-use>

- 납품일 (Delivery Date)
- 횟수 (Count)
- 거래처명 (Client Name)
- 납품 품목 (Delivery Items)
- 규격/단위 (Specification/Unit)
- 수량 (Quantity)
- 단가 (Unit Price)
- 공급가액 (Supply Amount)
- 세액 (Tax Amount)
- 계 (Total)
- 출력 (Print)

<tool-use data-tool-type="unknown" data-tool-name="mcp-cursor-ide-browser-cursor-ide-browser-browser_snapshot"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **mcp-cursor-ide-browser-cursor-ide-browser-browser_snapshot**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent (claude-4.5-sonnet)**_

Perfect! Now I have a comprehensive view of the transaction statement preview layout. Let me analyze what I've observed and prepare the report. Based on my inspection of the page, I can now provide a detailed report on the layout issues.

## Layout Inspection Report: 거래명세표 미리보기 (Transaction Statement Preview)

### (1) Visible Layout Problems Compared to Typical Invoice Template:

**Header Information Issues:**
- **Missing critical supplier/seller information**: Typical invoices have prominent supplier company name, address, business registration number, and contact details at the top. The current layout only shows minimal header information.
- **Recipient information placement**: The "거래처명" (client name) field shows "라임향드" but lacks complete recipient details (address, business number, etc.) that would typically appear in a formal invoice.
- **No clear invoice title hierarchy**: The "거래명세표" title appears small and not prominently displayed compared to standard invoice formats.
- **Missing logo/branding area**: No designated space for company logo or branding elements.

**Side-by-side duplicate layout:**
- The preview shows **two identical invoice forms side-by-side** (labeled with 3장/2장 buttons), which is unusual for a preview interface. This appears to be designed for printing two copies per page but creates visual confusion in the preview.
- Each invoice is compressed horizontally to fit two on screen, making them appear cramped.

**Data presentation:**
- The header section containing "작성일자", "공급받는자", "등록번호", etc. appears as a dense information block with poor visual separation.
- Column headers in the item table are adequate but font sizing seems small.

### (2) Text/Cell Overlap, Sizing, and Alignment Issues:

**Text overflow and truncation:**
- In the header metadata section, the text "부산시 남구 문 로33번길" appears to be truncated with "문 로33번길" suggesting the full address is cut off.
- The "사업자번호" (business registration number) "560-17-02264" appears cramped in its cell.
- Long item names in the "품목" (item) column like "코케허니예가체프G1" and "아체가요(25도)" are displayed without spacing, making them hard to read.

**Column width issues:**
- The "규격/단위" column shows values like "200G" and "1KG" which fit, but longer specifications might overflow.
- The "품목" column contains product names that are tightly packed without adequate padding.
- The "NO" column is very narrow, appropriate for single digits but may struggle with larger numbers.

**Alignment inconsistencies:**
- Numeric values (수량, 단가, 공급가액, 세액) appear properly right-aligned.
- The header information block has inconsistent vertical alignment between label-value pairs.

**Font sizing:**
- The table body text appears uniformly small (possibly 10-11px), which may be difficult to read when printed.
- The invoice title "거래명세표" is not significantly larger than body text, reducing visual hierarchy.

### (3) Print-Preview Inference and Issues:

**Page breaks and layout:**
- The side-by-side layout suggests this is designed to print **two invoice copies per A4 page**, which is efficient but may cause issues:
  - Each invoice would be approximately half-page width (too narrow for comfortable reading)
  - Standard invoice templates typically use full page width for better readability
  
**White space and margins:**
- The invoices appear to have minimal margins on the sides where they meet in the middle
- The empty rows in the item table (rows 6+) are visible, showing space allocation for additional items, but they consume significant vertical space

**Border and grid structure:**
- Table borders are visible and appear to be standard weight
- The grid structure is intact with no obvious border rendering issues

**Potential printing problems:**
- **Scaling issues**: When printed at actual size, the narrow invoice width may make text appear smaller than industry standard invoices
- **Cutting/separation**: If users want to separate the two invoices after printing, there's no clear cut line or perforation guidance
- **Information density**: The compressed width forces a high information density that may reduce readability on paper

**Missing print-specific elements:**
- No visible page numbers or "Page X of Y" indicators
- No print date/timestamp visible
- No clear "Original/Copy" designation on the duplicate invoices
- The empty table rows take up space that might be better collapsed in print

**Bottom summary section:**
- The footer shows totals (계: 262,500 / 26,250) which appear properly formatted
- The "입금계좌" (bank account) information is present but appears small

---

### Summary:
The main layout issues are: (1) side-by-side duplicate format creating cramped horizontal space, (2) missing critical invoice header information and hierarchy, (3) text truncation in address fields, (4) small font sizes throughout that may impact print readability, and (5) lack of standard invoice formatting elements like prominent company branding and clear visual hierarchy. The layout functions but doesn't match professional invoice standards in terms of information completeness and visual presentation.
